title: Iran Is Quickly Repairing Missile Bunkers, U.S. Intelligence Says
summary_full: Reports cast doubt on how close the United States is to destroying Iran’s missile capability, a key goal in the war.
summary_public: Reports cast doubt on how close the United States is to destroying Iran’s missile capability, a key goal in the war.
